step2_HERO_STORAGE_AUTHORITIES.winnerAfterReload: Authority A (manager config backgroundSource + heroAssetId) gates which payload key (B or C) is materialized into registry after reload.

step3_mismatch_proof.hypothesisA: Registry stores hero-image-123 but UI searches hero-image
step3_mismatch_proof.proofA: Image scenario after accept/reload keeps identical ID in registry and manager heroAssetId.
step3_mismatch_proof.hypothesisB: Registry stores assetId while UI searches heroAssetId
step3_mismatch_proof.proofB: Trace lines show assetId == heroAssetId at save/load/resolve/render stages.
step3_mismatch_proof.proofC: buildHeroAssetRegistry retained accepted IDs without stripping in runtime snapshots.

changes.summary: loadHeroVaultItems now materializes only active source (custom_image/custom_video) and binds active entry ID to manager heroAssetId, preventing generic fallback ID collisions.
Added authority and ID lifecycle diagnostics: [HERO_ASSET_ID_TRACE], [HERO_STORAGE_AUTHORITIES].
Added [HERO_ASSET_ID_TRACE] at accept stages and render stage.
Added [HERO_VAULT_RENDER] and [HERO_REGISTRY_COMPARE] diagnostics from registry render source.
